title: Add auto-updated timeline to recurring tasks

posts.author: libertitas (Bence Csomos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I have several recurring tasks with timelines. These tasks are automated and generated at every month but with empty (unallocated) timeline.

How can I automate tasks with auto-updated (filled) timeline related to the new month?
E.g.: I want to have automated tasks to come up at every 5th of a month.

Kind regards,
Bence

posts.author: HPETRIE (Hannah Petrie)
posts.cookedHtml: @libertitas Has this been answered? Looking to solve a similar question on my end.
